---
title: "Xiaoni's Website"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
---

This is Xiaoni's first website created for course P8105 at Columbia University. 


For more information on Xiaoni's academic and professional experience, visit [this page](more_info.html).


I am an avid birder, so please see a photo of a Purple Sandpiper that I took in Chicago:

<img src="images/PUSA.jpg" style="width:75%">

For more photos, visit [my photo library on eBird](https://media.ebird.org/catalog?userId=USER953216&mediaType=photo&sort=rating_rank_desc).

If you'd like to learn more about this website, visit [this page](about.html).
